key_evidence: OCHA Sit. Update 295: 59% of planned aid movements DENIED in execution despite nominal authorization via Jordan/Allenby crossing
Family of 9 killed in As Saftawi, North Gaza (May 28); at least 23 Palestinians killed in Al Bureij refugee camp (May 29)
HRW (May 19): Israel curbing aid and killing civilians during the ceasefire
Cumulative confirmed toll 72,619+ through early May
Post-ceasefire civilian-targeting confirmed as a distinct documented pattern
methodology_note: Floor confirmation at 0.0. NEW conduct sub-category AUTHORIZED-RESUMPTION-WITH-SYSTEMATIC-DENIAL defined: aid nominally authorized but 59% denied in execution (OCHA) — distinct from outright blockade, producing obstruction effect while preserving an access claim. Strengthens but does not change the existing 0.0 floor (already set by post-ceasefire civilian-targeting pattern). No composite movement.
